claims.summary: FEATURE_ABS_MAX can hide shape unless pre-bound value, per-dimension ceiling, and delivered value remain visible.
High-entropy tail participation receives a bounded smooth headroom lift while non-tail and reserved dimensions retain their existing ceilings.
Narrative-arc headroom, direction, curvature, and intertextual persistence are measured without live gain writes.
Increasing live gain on dimensions 40-43 would change semantic transport and requires scoped operator approval after replay and abort criteria.
